title: Mekanism Covers
description: A Mekanism addon that adds a simple way to cover its cables and pipes.
body: # Mekanism Covers A Mekanism addon that adds a simple way to cover its cables and pipes. ## Showcase ## How to use Craft the cover and combine it with the desired block in the crafting table. After that just right click the cable or pipe you want to cover. If you want to remove the cover, just break the block, use a Configurator in the wrench mode, or a wrench of another tech mod. ## Crashing with Iris, Oculus, Sodium, Embeddium, etc? If you're having any crashes while using mods that change Minecraft's rendering. Go into the config file located at your .minecraft/config/mekanismcovers.json, and set disableAdvancedCoverRendering to true. ## Recipes ## Other information For bug reporting please proceed to the mod's GitHub repository: https://github.com/lucaargolo/mekanism-covers If you have any other questions or suggestions, feel free to call me on Discord @D4rk#0693 You can find me in the Cafeteria Development guild. [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/707435077679841350/embed.png?style=banner2&v=2)](https://discord.com/invite/G4PjhEf)
